title: Live i18n Dev Server Builder
description: Wraps @angular/build:dev-server and mounts the live-i18n save API.

buildTarget.description: A build builder target to serve in the format `project:target[:configuration]`.

translationsPath.description: Workspace-relative path to the folder containing locale JSON files (e.g. apps/playground/public/i18n).

endpoint.description: Dev-server route that accepts translation save requests.
